svg.text: • 3. Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters — sliding window
• 76. Minimum Window Substring — variable window with frequency match
• 567. Permutation in String — fixed-size sliding window with counts
• 438. Find All Anagrams in a String — same as 567
• 424. Longest Repeating Character Replacement — window + max-freq invariant
• 5. Longest Palindromic Substring — expand-around-center or Manacher
• 49. Group Anagrams — sorted string or count-tuple as hash key
• 28. Find the Index of the First Occurrence — KMP / Rabin-Karp
• 394. Decode String — stack of (string, count) pairs
• 271. Encode and Decode Strings — length-prefix encoding
• 647. Palindromic Substrings — expand around centers, count
String questions live at the intersection of every other pattern.
